tasks.dev: deno task build && deno desktop -A --hmr --include ./dist main.ts
tasks.build:macos: deno task build && deno desktop -A --target aarch64-apple-darwin --include ./dist -o ./release/macos/Kraken.app main.ts
tasks.build:windows: deno task build && deno desktop -A --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --include ./dist -o ./release/windows/Kraken.exe main.ts
tasks.build:linux: deno task build && deno desktop -A --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --include ./dist -o ./release/linux/kraken main.ts
tasks.build:all: deno task build:macos && deno task build:windows && deno task build:linux
